channel.title: Control Synchronous Position - Tag - AG website
channel.description: Control Synchronous Position - Tag - AG website

item.title: Real-Time Multi-Vendor EtherCAT Motion Control (MCCL)
item.author: adgaona7@gmail.com (Andres Gaona)
item.description: A real-time, multi-vendor EtherCAT motion control platform was developed to abstract vendor differences while ensuring deterministic, synchronized multi-axis motion.
